mapper.sql: rdp_user.id id, rdp_user.gmt_create gmt_create, rdp_user.gmt_modified gmt_modified, rdp_user.uid uid, rdp_user.email email, rdp_user.username username, rdp_user.company company, rdp_user.phone phone, rdp_user.phone_area_code phone_area_code, rdp_user.sub_account sub_account, rdp_user.password password, rdp_user.op_password op_password, rdp_user.role_id role_id, rdp_user.access_key access_key, rdp_user.secret_key secret_key, rdp_user.last_try_login_time last_try_login_time, rdp_user.login_fail_count login_fail_count, rdp_user.login_locked login_locked, rdp_user.last_try_op_verify_time last_try_op_verify_time, rdp_user.op_verify_fail_count op_verify_fail_count, rdp_user.op_locked op_locked, rdp_user.account_type account_type, rdp_user.bind_type bind_type, rdp_user.bind_account bind_account, rdp_user.disable disable, rdp_user.user_domain user_domain, rdp_user.parent_id parent_id, rdp_user.user_status user_status, rdp_user.contact_me contact_me, rdp_user.src src, rdp_user.keyword keyword, rdp_user.client_id client_id, rdp_user.country country, rdp_user.maintainer maintainer, rdp_user.aliyun_ak aliyun_ak, rdp_user.aliyun_sk aliyun_sk, rdp_user.last_date_update_aliyun_ak last_date_update_aliyun_ak, rdp_user.last_date_update_pwd last_date_update_pwd, rdp_user.union_id union_id, rdp_user.sso_type sso_type, rdp_user.resource_manage_enable resource_manage_enable, rdp_user.customer_id customer_id, rdp_user.saas_user_status saas_user_status, rdp_user.access_token access_token, rdp_user.marketplace_type marketplace_type, rdp_user.use_mfa use_mfa
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM rdp_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND account_type = 'PRIMARY_ACCOUNT' limit 1

SELECT
FROM rdp_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND account_type = 'SUB_ACCOUNT'

SELECT
FROM rdp_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND phone_area_code = #{areaCode,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.console.web.dal.enumeration.AreaCode} AND account_type = 'PRIMARY_ACCOUNT' limit 1

SELECT
FROM rdp_user WHERE email = #{email} AND account_type = 'PRIMARY_ACCOUNT' limit 1

SELECT
FROM rdp_user WHERE email = #{email} AND account_type = 'SUB_ACCOUNT'

SELECT
FROM rdp_user WHERE company = #{company} AND account_type = 'PRIMARY_ACCOUNT'

SELECT
FROM rdp_user WHERE user_domain = #{domain} AND account_type = 'PRIMARY_ACCOUNT'

SELECT
FROM rdp_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND sub_account = #{subAccount} AND account_type = 'SUB_ACCOUNT'

SELECT
FROM rdp_user WHERE email = #{email} AND sub_account = #{subAccount} AND account_type = 'SUB_ACCOUNT'

SELECT
FROM rdp_user WHERE sub_account = #{subAccount}

SELECT
FROM rdp_user WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} and sub_account = #{subAccount} and bind_type = #{bindType}

SELECT
FROM rdp_user WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT
FROM rdp_user WHERE uid = #{uid}

SELECT
FROM rdp_user WHERE access_key = #{accessKey}

SELECT
FROM rdp_user WHERE uid in #{item}

SELECT
FROM rdp_user WHERE username = #{userName}

SELECT
FROM rdp_user WHERE role_id = #{roleId}

SELECT
FROM rdp_user WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}
SELECT count(*) FROM rdp_user WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}

SELECT
FROM rdp_user WHERE account_type = 'PRIMARY_ACCOUNT' and email != 'inner@clougence.com' and disable = 0 order by company asc

SELECT
FROM rdp_user WHERE maintainer = 1 and disable = 0 and login_locked = 0 order by company asc limit 5

SELECT uid, username FROM rdp_user WHERE user_domain = #{userDomain} and disable = 0 and login_locked = 0 and ( phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%') or username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%') or email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%') or uid LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%') )
order by username asc

SELECT
FROM rdp_user WHERE union_id = #{unionId} AND account_type = 'PRIMARY_ACCOUNT' AND sso_type = #{ssoType} limit 1

SELECT
FROM rdp_user WHERE parent_id = #{primaryId} AND disable = false

SELECT a.`uid`, a.`username`, b.`role_auth_labels`, c.`res_auth_label` FROM `rdp_user` a LEFT JOIN `rdp_role` b ON a.`role_id` = b.`id` LEFT JOIN `rdp_res_auth` c ON a.`uid` = c.`owner_uid` WHERE a.`account_type` = #{accountType} AND a.`parent_id` = #{parentId} AND c.res_id = #{resId} AND #{resPath} like concat(c.res_path,'%')
SELECT count(*) FROM rdp_user WHERE account_type = 'PRIMARY_ACCOUNT' and email != 'inner@clougence.com' and disable = 0
SELECT count(*) FROM rdp_user WHERE account_type = 'SUB_ACCOUNT' AND email != 'inner@clougence.com' AND disable = 0
SELECT count(*) FROM rdp_user WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} and account_type = 'SUB_ACCOUNT' and disable = 0

SELECT
FROM rdp_user where id in #{item}
mapper.update: UPDATE rdp_user SET last_try_login_time = #{lastTryLoginTime}, login_fail_count = #{loginFailCount}, login_locked = #{loginLocked} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE rdp_user SET password = #{password}, last_date_update_pwd = now() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE rdp_user
sub_account = #{subAccount},
username = #{userName},
WHERE uid = #{uid}

UPDATE rdp_user
phone = #{phone},
email = #{email},
WHERE uid = #{uid}
UPDATE rdp_user SET aliyun_ak = #{aliyunAk}, aliyun_sk = #{aliyunSk}, last_date_update_aliyun_ak = now() WHERE uid = #{uid}
UPDATE rdp_user SET access_key = #{accessKey}, secret_key = #{secretKey} WHERE uid = #{uid}
UPDATE rdp_user SET union_id = #{unionId}, sso_type = #{ssoType} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE rdp_user SET last_date_update_pwd = now() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM rdp_user left join rdp_role ON rdp_user.role_id=rdp_role.id WHERE parent_id=#{pid} and JSON_CONTAINS(rdp_role.role_auth_labels, '["' #{authLabel} '"]')
SELECT username FROM rdp_user WHERE uid = #{uid}
SELECT rdp_user.resource_manage_enable FROM rdp_user WHERE uid = #{targetUid}

SELECT
FROM rdp_user WHERE rdp_user.resource_manage_enable = 1 AND rdp_user.parent_id = ( SELECT r_inner.id FROM rdp_user r_inner WHERE r_inner.uid = #{puid} )

SELECT a.`uid`, a.`username`, b.`role_auth_labels`, c.`res_auth_label`, c.`res_id` FROM `rdp_user` a LEFT JOIN `rdp_role` b ON a.`role_id` = b.`id` LEFT JOIN `rdp_res_auth` c ON a.`uid` = c.`owner_uid` WHERE a.`account_type` = #{accountType} AND a.`parent_id` = #{parentId}
